---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A clear, one-sentence description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Why is this useful?

Explain the problem this feature solves or the value it adds. Who benefits from it and in what situation?

## Proposed behaviour

Describe what the feature should do from the user's perspective. Include any UI changes, new API endpoints, or configuration options.

## Implementation ideas

Optional — share any technical thoughts on how this could be built. For example:
- Which files or modules would need to change
- Any third-party libraries that might help
- Edge cases to consider

## Alternatives considered

Are there other ways to solve this problem? Why do you prefer the proposed approach?

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, links to similar features in other tools, or anything else that helps illustrate the request.
